source: MLB StatsAPI transactions joined to current slate teams

smarterGateRules.critical_pitcher_match: block_or_admin_review only when picked probable pitcher matches injured player
smarterGateRules.high: manual_review for picked-team high injury cluster
smarterGateRules.medium: manual_review for picked-team medium injury context

limits: covers official injured-list transactions, not all day-to-day injuries
team-level matching cannot fully know player importance without lineup/roster weighting
